sections.paragraph:
σύλλημμα, ατος, τό med. term since Galen (συλλαμβάνω) that which is conceived and is in the womb, fetus σύλλημμα ἔχει ἐκ πνεύματος ἁγίου (Mary) is pregnant through the Holy Spirit GJs 19:1.—DELG s.v. λαμβάνω.

med. med. = medicus (medical writer), medical

Galen Galen , II a.d.—List 5

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 956
